summary.brief: Motex LANSCOPE Endpoint Manager added to CISA KEV — confirmed in-the-wild exploitation. · Zohocorp Manageengine Adselfservice Plus — exploitation likelihood rose sharply (EPSS 2.5% → 21% · rising (+19%)). · 10 new critical disclosures — review patch status on exposed services.
bullets: Motex LANSCOPE Endpoint Manager added to CISA KEV — confirmed in-the-wild exploitation.
Zohocorp Manageengine Adselfservice Plus — exploitation likelihood rose sharply (EPSS 2.5% → 21% · rising (+19%)).
10 new critical disclosures — review patch status on exposed services.

digest.description: Lanscope Endpoint Manager (On-Premises) (Client program (MR) and Detection agent (DA)) improperly verifies the origin of incoming requests, allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary code by sending specially crafted packets.
digest.title: Motex LANSCOPE Endpoint Manager Improper Verification of Source of a Communication Channel Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Motex LANSCOPE Endpoint Manager Improper Verification of Source of a Communication Channel Vulnerability

descriptions.value: Lanscope Endpoint Manager (On-Premises) (Client program (MR) and Detection agent (DA)) improperly verifies the origin of incoming requests, allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary code by sending specially crafted packets.

digest.description: Zoho ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus 6111 and prior is vulnerable to linked applications takeover.
digest.title: zohocorp manageengine_adselfservice_plus

descriptions.value: Zoho ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus 6111 and prior is vulnerable to linked applications takeover.
Zoho ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus versiones 6111 y anteriores, son vulnerables a una toma de posesión de aplicaciones vinculadas

digest.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in axiomthemes White Rabbit whiterabbit allows Object Injection.This issue affects White Rabbit: from n/a through <= 1.5.2.
digest.title: axiomthemes white_rabbit Deserialization

descriptions.value: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in axiomthemes White Rabbit whiterabbit allows Object Injection.This issue affects White Rabbit: from n/a through <= 1.5.2.

digest.description: ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus below build 6116 contains an observable response discrepancy in the UMCP operation of the ChangePasswordAPI. This allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to determine whether a Windows domain user exists.
digest.title: zohocorp manageengine_adselfservice_plus

descriptions.value: ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus below build 6116 contains an observable response discrepancy in the UMCP operation of the ChangePasswordAPI. This allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to determine whether a Windows domain user exists.

ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus versiones anteriores a la compilación 6116, contiene una discrepancia de respuesta observable en la operación UMCP de la ChangePasswordAPI. Esto permite a un atacante remoto no autenticado determinar si se presenta un usuario de dominio de Windows

digest.description: Improper authorization in the temporary access workflow of Devolutions Server 2025.2.12.0 and earlier allows an authenticated basic user to self-approve or approve the temporary access requests of other users and gain unauthorized access to vaults and entries via crafted API requests.
digest.title: devolutions devolutions_server privilege escalation

descriptions.value: Improper authorization in the temporary access workflow of Devolutions Server 2025.2.12.0 and earlier allows an authenticated basic user to self-approve or approve the temporary access requests of other users and gain unauthorized access to vaults and entries via crafted API requests.
